name: ao3-rich-comment-editor
description: Format AO3 comments with rich text editing

scripts.start: npm install && npm run vendor && npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.vendor: cp node_modules/trix/dist/trix.umd.js vendor/trix.js && cp node_modules/trix/dist/trix.css vendor/trix.css && cp node_modules/dompurify/dist/purify.min.js vendor/purify.min.js
